title: rosa viscaria var. permixta
intro: Rosa viscaria var. permixta, also known as the Alpine rose or Alpenrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. permixta include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support women's health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
